area_anchor: Brikette — Analytics bar disappears silently when there's a problem and reloads too often
current_truth: The AnalyticsSummary component silently returns null when the API fails, hiding the entire analytics bar with no error feedback. It also re-fetches on every tab focus and sync action with no client-side cache.
next_scope_now: Add an error state UI to AnalyticsSummary, add a client-side cache with 5-minute TTL to avoid excessive re-fetches.
evidence_refs: operator-stated: analytics errors silently hide component; no client cache causes excessive re-computes
why: When the analytics feature has a problem loading, the metrics bar simply vanishes with no explanation. Staff might think the feature was removed or that there's nothing to show. It also recalculates every time you switch tabs, which is wasteful. Adding an error message and caching recent results makes the feature more reliable and efficient.

intended_outcome.statement: Analytics shows an error state when loading fails and caches results for 5 minutes to avoid unnecessary re-fetches.
